Ich dachte nicht das der Tag doch noch kommt an dem ich es sagen kann, aber das Game hat mit dem letzten Update wieder einen riesigen Sprung gemacht, und macht tatsächlich wieder richtig Spaß. Die Rollen sind tatsächlich endlich wieder Balanced, und der Goalie hat auch durch seine neuen Animationen einen riesigen Fortschritt gemacht dazu wirklich wieder nützlich zu sein. Das Game ist immernoch weit entfernt von perfekt und es muss definitiv noch den ein oder anderen Schritt machen aber das war endlich mal einer in die richtige Richtung. Leider kam der Patch jetzt ein bisschen spät, direkt nach Season 1 wäre deutlich besser gewesen auch für die Spielerzahl aber trotzdem sehr gut gemacht. Danke Sloclap!

Rematch is an arcade-style soccer game with a retro vibe, offering fun and accessible gameplay. With simple controls and fast-paced action, it's perfect for casual matches against friends or AI. Although it doesn't feature realistic graphics, the pixel art style and relaxed atmosphere create a nostalgic and engaging experience. It's ideal for those looking for a light, entertaining, and easy-to-learn football game.

I believe that after 45 hours of gametime, i have a ground where i can confidently say what i saw.


- For new players trying to learn the general mechanics, and while it´s generally easy to have a confortable grasp,  it only really has these offline drills (shooting, defence, dribble, pass, goalkeeper), and on their own, they don´t really help much in preparing new players for actual matches, i suggest offline matches with BOT players, similar to rocket league.

- While it may not be a issue for some, it is for me, the fact that the majorily of players don´t know how to be all-around, which is the exact method on how the players are placed when the match starts or when a goal is scored, i mostly play for fun, but when playing with egotistical people or people that don´t know simple concepts of football kinda takes the joy away, that is why i suggest, adding an extra choice, a role-specific matches, similar to overwatch, casual and ranked.

-Connection is far of being considered steady, it may vary a lot.

-There is not really a lot else to talk about the game from a general point of view, it is a simple multiplayer game.
While it´s mostly a fun casual once in a while game for me, and i am a lone gamer, i however , can see people having more fun if playing with friends.
 
In the end, i do recomend playing the game, but it´s definetely not worth its 25 euros

The developers clearly don't care about their game. The gameplay is interesting and has potential, but for some reason, the developers have completely neglected the game. The basic matchmaking system in the rankings is non-existent, and bronze players are matched with platinum players, which is the norm. Overall, the matchmaking system is one of the worst I've seen in online games. There are numerous lag issues and bugs that have not been resolved for a long time. The match starts well if it's the third time, because someone always gets kicked out, and sometimes you start the match with four players against five, and everything is fine. In the ranking, no matter what you do, you always get the same number of points for winning and losing. The monetization is completely stupid, the battle passes are uninteresting, and why would you buy them when most of the normal rewards are free? There's no point in buying skins that you can't edit in any way (even clothing). There are no notifications about new items in the store, and sometimes you just edit your character and find out that the developers have added new customization items, but they're not even displayed in the "store" tab. There are still many disadvantages to the game, and it's still in its early stages. It's possible that it will evolve into a well-defined and cohesive game in the future, but it's also possible that it will shut down prematurely, which is unfortunate because the concept is interesting.

Разработчикам явно плевать на свою игру. Геймплей интересный и потенциал есть, но разработчики по какой то причине просто забили на игру с нулевой. Банальная система подбора игроков в рейтинге - отсутствует, бронза играет с платиной - здесь это норма. В целом подбор игроков один из ужаснейших что я видел в онлайн играх. Куча лагов, багов которые уже долгое время не исправляются. Матч запускается хорошо если с 3 раза, ибо постоянно кто то да вылетает, бывает что вы уже начинаете матч вчетвером против пятерых и все ок. В рейтинге при этом всегда чтобы вы не делали при победе и поражении дают одинаковое количество очков. Совершенно глупая монетизация, боевые пропуска неинтересные и зачем их покупать если большинство самых нормальных наград там бесплатные? Покупать скины которые ты не можешь никак редактировать(даже одежду) смысла 0. Уведомлений о новых предметах в магазине тоже нет, иногда ты просто редактируешь персонажа и оказывается разработчики добавили новые предметы для кастомизации, но их не отобразили даже во вкладке "магазин". Минусы еще долго можно перечислять, пока эта игра выглядит как супер ранняя альфа и быть может через год другой она превратится во что то понятное и цельное, но честно говоря мне кажется она раньше захлопнется, что печально ибо задумка интересная.

Genuinely a very hard game to review. Is it GOOD? yes, I'd even say it's very well made. But is it exactly what you want it to be? Not even remotely close. For starters I don't think their servers can handle the game's popularity and what happens on your screen is not what happens on everyone's screen and the game will often seemingly side with whoever ISN'T you. Additionally the community is just awful, like one of the worst groups of gamers you could possibly encounter. You should really only play ranked if you have at least 1 friend for 3s and 2 friends for 5s cuz it is a selfish un-tactical community and it just stops being fun at a certain point. BUT I digress, if you have a group of friends who can play together consistently it's worth buying at $30 and 1000% worth watching for a sale. 7.5/10, potentially a 9/10 with bug fixes and better servers.


EDIT 12/17/2025 -

So the devs have killed this game. The gameplay is now repetitive slop, they've done nothing to address the community issues, yet to see any evidence of the report feature working in any way. They've ruined every aspect of the gameplay that was good.
Fun close control abilities? not anymore! every touch is now 5 feet and if you're boosting you might as well just pass it to the other team. Also goalkeeping is way too easy and also too punishing, which doesn't seem to be possible. The ball magnetizes to the keepers hand whenever it goes across the face despite it being unsavable in reality, yet you just kinda slowly dive just over or just under the ball sometimes for no reason.

Unfortunately there isn't a better option if you want a football game still as EAFC is generationally bad.

La base del juego y su premisa suenan increíble pero en la práctica cada parche rompe mas de lo que arregla, el juego debería haber salido o gratis o en early access, pero en el estado en el que está no puedo recomendarlo. El matchmaking es horrible, no hay penalización para la gente que se desconecta, no se puede reportar en el propio juego y honestamente pese a que he jugado bastante siento que no vale lo que me costó, mas aún teniendo en cuenta que tiene pase de batalla y moneda premium.

He vuelto a jugar unas 20 horas mas. Misma mierda. Estando en plata te ponen con gente en Elite. O arregláis el matchmaking o en un año el juego está muerto.


He vuelto en la season 3, sorprendentemente la verdad que le han hecho un pequeño rework a las animaciones del portero y supongo que mas ajustes en general no solo al portero, mas aparte han añadido un sistema de reportes, y creo que para mí el estado del juego es mejor. Por el precio que tiene la versión base ahora sí que podría recomendarlo.

This game is fun but the online infrastructure sucks.

Pros:
Game is insanely fun with friends if you just do unranked or don't care about RP. It is also relatively easy to pick up as somebody who has NEVER played a sports game before, however the tutorial does leave out some mechanics that you should know to get better at the game. 

Cons:
-Online lag is horrendous. When somebody lags, they still get priority over the ball. There have been countless moments where me and my team have tackled somebody but then they just lag back in place and somehow have the ball again. I have quite literally seen goalkeepers just teleport out of the way and vanish into thin air. I could list every weird server lag interaction I've had but then this review would be pages long. 
-Ranked infrastructure is poor. People from any rank can group with each other and the RP rewarded/taken away will still be the same for everybody. I know this because my friend who is Masters/Elite accidentally queued me and my other friend (both bronze at the time) into a ranked game and we somehow won and ALL OF US got +20 RP. 
-They butchered goalkeeping mechanics after season 0. For some reason, even if you are 100% correctly positioned or correctly guess the direction of a shot, sometimes you will slow dive or dive extremely upwards for NO reason. No idea why it does this, I do not remember this being a thing in season 0. Even as somebody who LIKES to be in the goalkeeper box, it is quite frustrating to correctly dive for something that is EASILY savable but then the game decides that I am going to be diving upwards. 

Overall the game is fun, but needs some MAJOR fixes to goalkeeping, matchmaking, general server connection quality, and maybe some more tutorials for advanced techniques and controls. Maybe a training mode where you can practice drills on certain mechanics.

This game has fallen off so much in just one season. First off, how in the world do you screw up the GK position even more than it has been? I mean it's already bugged but now there's this weird animation dive where you dive a millimeter to the left or right and jump slightly up like you're giving a high five to casper. It just doesn't make sense why they would even add that dive in the first place or why it's so sensitive to simple left and right inputs which ruins the reads on strikers. Season 0 was definitely more bugged but some mechanics like the ippy slide actually made dribbling less predictable and more rewarding instead, all the defenders just waiting for a rainbow flick error in this season and get heavily rewarded. Goalkeeping feels like a 9-5 with under minimum wage and dribbling feels like Rock Lee put the weights back on.

I really love this game and hit elite season 0 so please stop butchering it thanks.

That's all I gotta say

Una cagada, el juego cada vez tiene menos jugadores y no ha logrado recuperarse. Cada semana hay menos gente conectada, y ahora que el gamepass subió de precio, menos todavía lo va a jugar la gente.

Los devs siempre se atrasan con las actualizaciones, y el contenido nuevo brilla por su ausencia. Se enfocan más en meter cosméticos que en arreglar o mejorar el juego. En el estado en que salió, sinceramente parece un Early Access, no un juego completo.

Encima está carísimo para lo que ofrece. Tiene problemas de conexión, packet loss, y una desincronización brutal. Estás jugando tranquilo y de la nada el juego te hace un rollback de unos segundos, te deja parado sin la pelota y no entiendes nada.

La verdad, el juego está muy verde y no justifica el precio. Las “ofertas” que ponen son ridículas, y si no hacen algo pronto, esto se va a morir o van a tener que hacerlo free to play, que quizás es lo que debió ser desde el principio.

Yo lo jugué más de 100 horas en Game Pass, y ahora que estuvo gratis aca en steam aproveché de dejar mi reseña. Pero sinceramente, no lo recomiendo. No lo compren. Esperen a que baje a menos de 10 dólares o mejor a 5. Porque con la suerte que hay, capaz lo compran y después lo hacen free to play, o directamente lo abandonan.

En resumen: no vale la pena por ahora, aguántense el FOMO si es que existe alguno por este juego.

La mediocridad de Sloclap va a matar este juego...

No recomiendo comprar este juego al precio actual. Tiene buen potencial, pero ciertos aspectos reflejan un nivel de mediocridad por parte de Sloclap que impide que valga lo que cuesta.

Pésima conexión y un sistema de prioridad sin sentido. Es inaceptable que aún no se sancione a quienes abandonan las partidas, al final termina siendo un  3v1, 4v2, etc.

Edit: Llegué a las 100 horas de juego, va de mal en peor, únicamente sacan puras colaboraciones de cosméticos, ahora hay más bugs, es bastante complejo detener a los atacantes cuando abusan del rainbow flick, es pura cuestión de suerte a este punto. Poco a poco se refleja que los jugadores son menos, tardo más de lo normal en encontrar una partida. Muchas veces el partido queda en desventaja por falta de jugadores (ya sea para ti o para tu equipo rival). No recomiendo nisiquiera seguir jugando, por ese precio se pueden conseguir algo muchísimo mejor.
Por otro lado, la jugabilidad sigue muriendo, una y otra vez lo mismo.

Es triste que el juego se encuentre en este punto, he tenido unos partidazos con compañeros increíbles, pero lo que no se cuida, se acaba.

Don't waste your money. This game was fun in the early beta, but since then it has taken such a nose dive. Somehow every patch doesn't fix the most blaring issues with the game and instead adds more glitches bugs and weirdness. The majority of the games feel like you got robbed, that is if you don't crash or become unable to interact with the ball, or experience one of the hundred other issues that can happen and make it unable for you to play the game. This game being 30 dollars is inexcusable with what a mess it is. This is the type of game I would expect to be free to play with the battle pass system they have. Also, there is a "ranked" system in this game, but it is meaningless since anyone can reach the highest rank in the game by just playing rather than being good at it. Overall, would not recommend it, especially at this price point.

"To be honest, I paid for something that looked great in demos, but once the game was launched, it just kept getting worse and worse. I'm always stuck playing on some random person's stupid stadium and scenarios, which doesn't interest me at all. If I want to play in a stadium, I should be able to enjoy it, just like with the other features I mentioned.

Today, I'm uninstalling the game, hoping that they'll take all this into account and revive the game, because the number of active players has dropped significantly, they haven't fixed almost any bugs, and the big problem is that when someone is in front of the ball, they can't block it because the other player already has their kick charged. I DON'T RECOMMEND THIS GAME UNTIL THE CREATORS GET THEIR ACT TOGETHER AND LISTEN TO THEIR COMMUNITY."

With terrible server performance, constant leavers, and game-breaking exploits, this game is a terrible experience. It's a big shame... I've been playing 3 v 3 comp and 5 v 5. 2 out of 3 matches I get 1 to 3 leavers; how am I supposed to climb like that? 

I will stop playing; give it a few more weeks. If things change by then, I may switch this review. It's just sad, really. 

Update: Just got to rank elite in both 3v3 and 6v6, server issues are less present but I am still unable to play quickplay because I keep getting disconnected and then banned. I play a lot of online games and I have never suffer like I suffer with rematch

私はキーマウでプレイしています。おそらくコントローラーでプレイしたほうがいろいろとやりやすいと思います。
ゲーム性はロケットリーグ人間版のような感じで、慣れるまで少し時間がかかると思います。
ドリブル技で相手を抜いた時や自分の狙ったパスで味方がゴールを決めたとき楽しいと感じました。

チュートリアルはこのゲームに必要な要素をある程度しっかりと説明できているように感じています。わからなくなったら何回でも見直すことができます。

ゲームモードはカジュアルとランクに分かれています。
カジュアルは3v3、4v4、5v5の3個があります。（恐らくみんなランクをやっているのか、自分のプレイする時間が悪いのかはわかりませんが、少しマッチングに時間がかかります）
ランクは3v3、5v5の2つがあります。（レベルが5レベルになるまで解放されません）

1. Horrible networking, disconnection is not that rare, and reconnecting never works.
2. No reporting, blocking or any kind of moderation options inside the game.
3. Ranked matches do not offer any relief from the trolling or disconnecting players. If someone disconnects, you still lose ranking as if it was a normal match, same goes if a player scores against your own net 4 times. To make it worse, Ranking up does not take into account any kind of in game activity that you did. You could have made 13 interceptions, 21 passes, and 6 goals, or you could have zero score. You will still get 20 points. So why do anything?
4. Paid pass, inside a 25€ game.
5. Several other bugs and exploits.

The only reason I have these many hours in this game is because there's nothing like it in the market.
The game is a buggy mess, it was in closed beta, it was the same in open beta, it was basically the same at launch even though devs knew it was basically unplayable.
After a few months from launch, nothing changed, they get rid of one bug, another one appears immediately, the meta is the most uninteractive ♥♥♥♥ ever conceived, with high crosses where the defender has no input and can only hope that diving towards the ball works, cause a couple shooting animations make the ball go above the defender.
They introduced a report feature months after the game was released, but there are no penalties for being reported or leaving games, so a lot of people just troll and leave mid games, even in ranked.
If you don't play as a 5 stack it's unplayable aswell, cause you only face 5 stacks spamming the same set piece over and over with low effort, which is very hard to defend, ESPECIALLY if you are playing with random.
Me and my friend just played 5 games, every single one was against 5 stacks just spamming wall crosses and long balls, with our defenders going thru the ball or getting our animations canceled for no reason.
There's no excuse to make people play against 5 stacks, especially after devs introduced 3v3s ranked that split up the player base even more, instead of just making a separate queue for 5 stacks

Hell people are playing without legs right now. What my final straw is and over half the player base that has left is the nerf to movement. For an elite level soccer player you run at the pace of a 5 year old, and you can't dribble past anyone without using absurd techs that weren't even intended in the game. The movement in the beginning was enough to take this game places and now they have soiled the one last thing keeping this game alive. Please sell this game to a company that listens to its player base.

Safe to say this game is as good as dead at this point. Game breaking bugs in every new patch, the community is a cesspit of human waste, and perhaps worst of all the devs are completely clueless as to where they want to take the game. The gameplay currently is extremely boring and has been for a while, there is virtually no depth to the mechanics because they have no vision for the game, and so every match ends up being too similar to the previous after only a few hours of gameplay. It doesnt even come close to the level of skill expression that a game like rocket league for example allows. And then we can move on to the scummy developers and their using of some of the worst practices of MTX in the industry, like FOMO, grindy battle passes on a 30 euro game etc. Wish I could get a refund.

[h1] Очень сомнительно, и не окэй  [/h1]
Изначально зацепил трейлер и реклама игры у блогеров.
Пришло время, купил ее после бесплатных выходных. Поиграл в нее 30 часов и могу сделать краткое резюме. Начну со стандартных +-.
 [b]Плюсы: [/b]
1) Новый динамичный формат игры в футбол. А-ля режим "профи" в фифе.
2) Достаточно простое управление и низкий порог вхождения в игру.
3) Оооочень корявая кастомизация персонажа, спасибо, что есть)
 [b] Минусы: [/b]
1) В Москве пинг 80, и этим всё сказано. Это почти неиграбельно. Все подкаты на моём экране летят в мяч, а пролетают мимо. Да,да, я сравнивал с режимами с ботами, проходил тренеровки, сидел с ботами в обучении. Думал проблема во мне.
2) БАГИ БАГИ БАГИ с голами. Мяча в воротах не было даже рядом, сервер считает, что гол забит. Показывают повтор, МЯЧА В ВОРОТАХ НЕТ!!!
3) Крайне не рекомендую покупать игру в соло. Играть в одиночку практически невозможно. Тиммейты то ли с пингом 300, то ли с брейнлагом. Командной игры в соло режиме не существует. Ты просто 5 минут смотришь как чуваки бегают и пропускают мячи. (возможно из-за пункта 2, или просто слабенькие). Но не осуждаю, все учатся. Но когда чувак принципиально пропускает 2-3 гола выбегая из ворот, ливает - это уже ненормально.
4) Отсутствие штрафных санкций за лив из игры. За специальное забитые голы себе в матче(ОСОБЕННО в рейтинге).
5) Сделайте адекватный голосовой чат. У 99% игроков он выключен, потому что он неудобен. Нет возможности кинуть в мут игрока по ходу катки. Поэтому мне проще выключить его, чем слушать, как школьник 5 минут хрипит в микрофон и НИЧЕГО с этим не сделать, только оффнуть звук чата в игре.
6) Кастомизация максимально скудная, все ходят с 2-3 прическами, потому что остальные просто ужас ради галочки. Я купил "боевой пропуск", получил все плюшки, но контент никак не изменился на фоне обычных игроков. Дали парочку видов кастомизаций узора на майку)))) 
7) Молчу про ценник в 1400 рублей для такой сырой альфа версии.
8) Режим "Вратаря" - из-за среднего пинга в 90-100 мс невозможно нормально ловить мячи. Смотришь повтор - ты летишь в сторону мяча, а он каким- то образом пролетает сквозь тебя. (Да, ранее писал про 80 - это в лучшем случае).

Я ОЧЕНЬ надеюсь, что вы будете очень активно работать над игрой и она будет желанием всех плееров)
А пока что 3/10.

Riddled with bugs that get worse with each update, the current exploit makes players zip and teleport around with the ball suddenly changing directions like they're some stupid anime character. They still haven't fixed Crosshairs resetting constantly and it took them 2 months to fix achievements (how the hell do you even screw up achievements????)

FOMO content that takes far too long to grind and is gone forever if you don't finish the battle pass. There's not even simple daily challenges to help speed up the grind, just the xp boost from the first win of the day. 

Horrid player base filled with the most toxic tryhards that ruin all the fun of the game by using exploits and just playing Juggle The Ball because they know there's effectively no way to counter it.

3V3 ranked got added recently and is fundamentally flawed. If players want to win Desperately, they can score one goal and just then pass back between each other and there's literally nothing that can be done other than try to force a mistake. There will always be an open player or an open goal when trying to counter this strategy.

Goalkeeper is a miserable game of "Will my character actually make an effort or dive above the ball like an idiot" This could be fixed if they just ALLOWED YOU TO CONTROL HOW HIGH THE KEEPER DIVES! Instead it's "dYnAmIc" which just means that you'll get screwed 50% of the time.

I played the hell out of this game and wanted to give them the benefit of the doubt but the new exploit right now is genuinely the most miserable thing of all time. I won't be the idiot who says that this game is dead or that I'm quitting anytime soon. This is just so much frustration from someone who desperately wanted this game to work so I didn't have to play FIFA for any type of footballing experience...

Not a fun game. Overpriced. Toxic community. Avoid.

First and foremost the price tag for REMATCH is under no circumstance justifiable. Selling it as a full release title, when in functionality it's at best an early access game, maybe even an alpha is just disgusting but can (most likely) be accounted to it generating hype during it's "beta" testing. The game is NOT polished to be released as even a beta, do NOT buy it over a cent more than 5 EURO. 

For the menu and UI alone we have:
- a laggy menu, the buttons to get to your equipment, store, etc. just take way longer than they should
- accessory slots that do not serve any functions, for the lack of items. Character customisation is pretty pointless if I don't have items to customise my char with
- half of those items you can buy to customise your character are clipping through the player model. now, I don't know if that is a problem mysteriously only with my computer, however still a lot of hairs, gloves, socks, and even some combination of shirts still clip. The game was released in January. Nice Balenciaga sponsorship Sloclap. Seemed a good enough time to mention that.

Gameplay:
the devs have made it painfully clear that they not only don't know where to take this game, they are on top of it also insufferably incompetent when it comes to making a multiplayer pvp game.
The priority system for accepting balls and intercepting them is garbage. 99.9% of the time better positioning or reading a pass/shot does not get rewarded, simply because the enemy striker will just shove his foot through your skull and shoot the ball anyway, no matter when you started entering the jumping animation to pass it away. In most cases the player that shoots the ball, no matter positioning, nor timing will just simply win. Epic.
Most movement """mechanics""" are bugs. No matter how many of these brainrotten REMATCH Youtuber cucks are trying to convince you that them going left/right/back/forth with instananeous momentum change, no proper animation and glitchy ball movement is actually quite skillful and requires good mechanics: They are wrong. These "mechanics" are bugs. They are using glitches to compensate being dogwater at the game, because their parents are siblings. You can tell it's just bugs simply by how half the time you intercept these mechanics the ball will simply rollback onto their feet, or alternatively it cancels your animation, while they just keep going. Defending is by a landlside worse than being on the offense, not because these people are the online Messi, but because the game doesn't even know what to do with it.

The missle shot meta has been in the game since launch, and now that there's unwanted drifting while walking with defense stance, extra effort running SOMETIMES locks your rotation and the game just overall feeling unresponsive with input lag, you will basically only encounter 3 of your bozo team mates sucking their own balls in the enemy penalty box, waiting for someone to shoot them the ball from across field, so they can try to volley it in. This stratagy is more effective as ever, it's disgustingly easy to pull off and very often players get rewarded for playing this incredibly asinine and mind numbing gameplay, simply because they cannot do anything else and the devs want to actively punish you for doing anything else.
Which brings me to matchmaking: Keep in mind, I've reached the highest rank in the game ELITE in like the first 72-ish hours (if I recall correclty) of play, so my perspective on the game only reflects that elo, supposedly. I'm saying supposedly because by a miracle of modern engineering Sloclap has managed to cultivate the most incompetent community to ever defile this earth. Typically the highest rank in pvp games is like the top 1%, in REMATCH you GUARANTEED will get 1 guy who's ragequitting after 1 mistake they usually made themselves, or one guy who cannot receive a singular ball, no matter how precise you play it to them, or one guy who literally doesn't know the controls, or generally mesmerising levels of terrible play. I'm quite convinced half of the people playing this game are apes living in a zoo, throwing their own dung at the keyboard and that's how they move around in this game. Most of the time you get actual vegetables. No clue if it's forced 50% winrate through hidden MMR or whatever, but playing anything that isn't a full 5 stack in ranked is torture. I cannot imagine how it has to be in plat and below.

The game costs A LOT of money, for sub-par service provided. Maybe the devs wake up from cognitive cryostasis one of these centuries and manage to fix it. But at this point I doubt it. Maybe if they release season 2 in 5 months without any gameplay changes, like with S1. Might be factually, undoubtedly, unfathomably bussin.

Французские разработчики, имея за плечами 3D файтинг, решили скрестить его с футболом, который будто-бы популярен как никогда. На фоне победы соотечественников в ЛЧ и проведения КЧМ в США лучше времени для релиза и не придумать, не так ли? Всё что остаётся: взять геймплей из прошлой игры, подпилить для PvP и сделать свою Rocket League. Проще сказать, чем сделать, но можно же было сделать хоть что-то? Нет! Кривое управление, неткод, матчмейкинг, оптимизация, цена, вы будете удивлены некомпетентности создателей этого кошмара! Не прошло и полугода, а игра на предсмертном одре, оставшиеся насладились ожиданием патчей, в которых много чего обещалось, но разраб сказал - разраб сказал. В чартах вы можете видеть 5-10к игроков, но в масштабах планеты это приводит к играм против одних и тех же людей раз за разом подряд, вы уже как знакомые, которым с радостью поставили бы свечку за упокой. За своё жалкое существование игра стала прибежищем для самых закалённых чудесами французского программирования фанатов, для которых вы можете стать либо товарищем по мазохизму, либо грушей для битья. Блаженны те кто не потратил кровные на этот апогей бездарности, единственный плюс - после неё остальные игры даже не кажутся чем-то отвратительным.

Otra vez haciendo la reseña, porque LOS DESARROLLADORES NO PARAN DE ARRUINAR EL JUEGO DIA A DIA Y MÁS AUN CON EL PARCHE QUE SE VIENE.

Te explico brevemente:

Muchas personas entrenaron durante DIAS DE SU VIDA, y con eso me refiero a MÁS DE 600 horas dedicadas al juego, sólo para ser mejores, expresar su estilo de juego mejor, y demostrar lo que pueden hacer en la cancha.

Que hace SLOCLAP? Bien, chau regates que están desde el parche 0, chau el sentido casual que tenia el juego, esto es FIFA en primera persona, y NADIE vino por el FIFA. NADIE.

Todos vinimos para disfrutar de un juego único en su tipo, que permitía una expresión de movimientos jamás vistos en otro juego de fútbol, y la verdad, como alguien que no le apasionaba el fútbol tanto, a querer pasar a jugarlo constantemente en la vida real gracias a Rematch, y que los desarrolladores sigan arruinando el juego porque "Ay, es que no juegan en equipo" MENTIRA. Los jugadores con los que tengo el gusto de jugar son ASOMBROSOS.

Regates que se nota que perfeccionaron y practicaron por MESES para lograr ese nivel, pases tan precisos que parecen hechos con un rifle de francotirador en vez de la pierna, reacciones tan rápidas que parece que están peleando a puño limpio en la vida real y evadiendo todo, y estos SAPOS siguen arruinando este hermoso juego que tanto significa para muchísimas personas que lo juegan todos, o casi todos los días, porque es única esa sensación de querer la Revancha.

El portero está oficialmente arruinado, a estas alturas podrían poner que el juego oficial es 4v4 y que el portero sea una IA y listo, porque es literalmente inútil querer atajar apropiadamente hoy.

Por más que saltes en tiempo perfecto, por más que a veces hasta predigas a dónde va a patear el otro y saltes antes de tiempo, las animaciones de tu monigote nunca aciertan. Te disparan por el piso? Saltemos por arriba de la pelota. Te disparan por encima tuyo? Saltemos por abajo de la pelota / Tirémonos a dormir una siestita en el pasto por 1 segundo.

Supuestamente en el próximo parche quieren introducir un poco más de expresión en la habilidad de la portería.

Perdón? Alguna vez jugaron de porteros los estúpidos que deciden este tipo de cosas? No, o sí? 

Ya no se puede jugar en portería, porque por más bueno que seas, si te meten un buen disparo a la portería, es gol. Indiferente de si sos buen arquero, estás bien parado, o reaccionás súper rápido.

He sacado ya decenas de clips de goles que se tendrían que haber atajado en cualquier otro parche anterior, y ahora ya no. Intercepciones súper fáciles que se hacen en el área que ya no podés hacer porque las animaciones del portero son las mismas que un nene de 4 años agarrando la pelota por primera vez en su vida.

El chiste se cuenta solo.

Joguei Absolver, Joguei Sifu, e Joguei Rematch. Amo os dois primeiros. E tentei amar o terceiro. Não é um jogo viável. Não compre. Na minha experiência, você se apaixona pela ideia (é boa mesmo), tem potencial, é incrível nos trailers. E você se dedica a praticar e aprender uma função dentro de campo, para que na próxima atualização, hajam bugs novos que te prejudicam, jogam fora o seu tempo, amor, carinho, dedicação e esforço, e dinheiro no LIXO. Se você estiver como goleiro e alguém te desarma, independentemente da circunstância, é gol. Na última atualização, os saltos para o lado do goleiro se tornaram inviáveis, pois a animação de salto lateral foi substituida por uma animação que tenta pegar a bola no alto e não cobre área quase nenhuma. Olha, eu lutei muito pra pegar o Elite na primeira temporada jogando como main goleiro. O jogo cospe na minha cara e a partir da postagem dessa review, eu não vou mais jogar, independentemente de atualizações futuras. Eles precisam entender que o balanceamento é muito mais delicado quando todo mundo só tem uma classe. NÃO compre o jogo! Uma hora vai ficar de graça, e você provávelmente não vai ganhar nada por ter comprado.

Dentro de campo, ele não joga apenas futebol: ele transforma o gramado em uma arena. Cada drible carrega a precisão de um golpe ensaiado, cada proteção de bola lembra a firmeza de uma guarda, e cada finalização explode como o ataque de um verdadeiro lutador.

As artes marciais não o afastaram do futebol, pelo contrário: deram disciplina, foco e equilíbrio. Nos tatames, ele aprendeu a respeitar o adversário, a controlar a mente e a buscar a vitória com estratégia. No futebol, ele aplica tudo isso com inteligência e intensidade, mostrando que técnica e coração andam juntos.

Jogador, lutador e exemplo de superação. Ele prova que é possível unir duas paixões em um só propósito: evoluir, vencer e inspirar. E esta também pode a sua jornada.

I’ve been patient with this game, always hoping the next patch would finally fix the problems. But no—it’s the same story every time. The devs either break something else, make things worse, or simply don’t fix what they promised.

The same issues have been here since release:

- Bugs everywhere

- Long queue times (the player base is dying)

- Terrible matchmaking with one of the strangest ranking systems I’ve ever seen—based more on “emotions” and "we don't want you to be stressed"  than actual competitiveness

This game had potential, but it’s been wasted. Unless the current dev team is replaced with one that actually delivers, I’d recommend staying far away.

Cependant le jeu comporte des gros soucis :
- Les serveurs sont instables, des freezes, des déconnexions. Lors des matchs classés c'est n'importe quoi de se retrouver en 1v3 et de n'avoir aucune compensation en RR, donc un match perdu gratuit.
- Des bugs surement du a cause des serveurs, des tacles qui ne passe pas, des réceptions brouillons parfois on ne comprends pas ce qui se passe à l'écran. Un jour un tacle a provoqué automatiquement un but (la balle n'étais pas dans les cages).
- Le matchmaking a l'air aléatoire voir inexistant, lors de nos 20 premiers matchs, n'ont n'avons gagner aucun match, si les nerfs ne sont pas solides on peut vite abandonner le jeu.
-  Le contenu additionnel qui est effectivement très lent, les mises a jour sont lent a venir, et donc difficile de garder de l'intérêt lorsque le jeu reste le même pendant 1 mois, avec les mêmes bugs et même contenu.

Mais je le rappelle le jeu a un vrai potentiel mais un vrai boulot au niveau du code doit être effectué. En espérant que ce travail sera fait. La courbe de progression est vraiment plaisant a vivre.

Rematch is a buggy, unpolished and borderline unplayable mess... but its paid season pass system works just fine!

The game's not finished and Sloclap have effectively admitted as much in their own patch notes:

[quote=Sloclap] [i]'This feature was released a bit earlier than planned and still had a few issues. We’ve decided to remove it temporarily and will reintroduce it in a future patch once it’s been polished.'[/i] [/quote]

They're charging £21 (around $30, I think) for the game and have implemented a real-money season pass system before it's even in a solid state. The game has loads of potential but don't get your hopes up that they're interested in fixing it because it seems like their priorities lie with selling in-game content.

Here are some examples of things that will give you a feel for the quality of this game:
[list]
    [*]Goals are 'scored' randomly and for no reason - there are countless examples of this on the Rematch subreddit. This can happen at any time the ball is moving vaguely in the direction of a goal, or just randomly. You absolutely will lose matches because of this.
    [*]Player models are quite often missing legs.
    [*]There are loads of little quality-of-life issues which all add to the feeling of a lack of polish.
    [*]You can't mute, report or block players. (What kind of online game doesn't have this basic feature?)
    [*]There doesn't seem to be any way to unlock all of the cosmetics without handing over more money. Others have said you lose the option to unlock cosmetics at the end of the season too, even after paying.
[/list]

Game's pretty good honestly, it's a fun idea and enjoyable

But the game has way too many gamebreaking bugs, i have what i believe the best PC among my friends and not even i can be saved from these bugs and performance issues

1. You can randomly get DCd out of nowhere from the match, even if there was no indication of lag anywhere, if it happens there's multiple coinflips happening

- Coinflip 1: On DC from match there's a 50/50 chance whether you can just reconnect or you have to close the game and re-open, which takes A LOT of time, even on my PC it takes at least 1min of the 5min match, for some friends it can be 3 to 4 minutes which is basically the entire match

- Coinflip 2: IF you reconnect, regardless of the method used from coinflip 1, there's a chance you will be unable to touch the ball altogether, making you a very [b] immersive spectator [/b] , this bug is rather recent compared to early when instead it's possible that you just didn't keep the ball in place on your screen even though others see you have it (but you can AT LEAST interact with it, so this new one is just a worst version of it)

- Coinflip 3: IF you reconnect, there's a chance you'll be kicked out immediately again (usually allows reconnect without closing the game so it's a bit better in that sense)

2. The infamous "can't hold the ball" bug, didn't happen last time i played but over the time i have on the game there has NEVER been a session (either 1 hour up to 6 hours long) where this bug didn't happen to EACH member of my team at least once (i generally play full pre-made)

3. Desync bugs and server issues, why is it that sometimes even though i have 30ms on shooter games, and in my screen i grabbed the ball properly and predicted the enemy accordingly, the ball suddenly Teleports into my goal? after so long i'd expect this would be fixed but it still happens sometimes

4. (Recent bug) Menu UI can straight up crash the game, i mistakenly clicked on someone offline (trying to invite a different friend) and for some reason the game froze entirely, after waiting a while i had to close the game and restart

Overall, the game itself is good, but the execution has been terrible, too many bugs to enjoy

[h1] update in 2026 [/h1]

Game is still very buggy. Playerbase has diminished so drastically that you play the same 5 people over and over and over. Matchmaking is very bad. Elites are all over teams with plats, golds and silvers. Huge advantages for KBM players that aren't being patched yet. RIPPPP 

[h1] The Good, The Bad, and the Ugly - The Review You Should Read [/h1]

Let me begin this by saying I have spent enough time in this game to see it all. Every awesome win, every amazing comeback, every clutch save. Every bug, every glitch, every toxic player type there is. If someone has played less than 100h on this game, their review should be taken with a grain of salt. This game is so, so close to being amazing. I [b] LOVE [/b] the concept. Let this be the review that sums up everything. If you're going to read one, read this. 


[h2] The Good[/h2]
Sloclap promised us a big shakeup from standard soccer gameplay. Individual control, no auto pass, skill based matchmaking, exciting gameplay. On this, they delivered - when the game clicks, it feels really, really fun. Playing with friends is awesome, especially if you have a full stack of 5, in a discord server where you can chat and strategize in real time. Overall, there is a wide range of technical variance to how you can play the game, and a good number of mixups (in theory, more on that later) for you to keep the plays exciting and different. There's a good amount of customization to make your characters feel unique. I see a lot of people complaining about the battlepass for a $30 game, which I understand, but there are much bigger issues at hand before I'd start complaining about that. 

[h2] The Bad[/h2]
This one is so big there has to be subcategories. Sorry Sloclap, I'm just being honest. 

[h3] Matchmaking[/h3]
Frequent long wait times, with matches that span an absurd amount of skill ranges. Often, 5 solo queuers will be matched with a full fledged tournament ready team, which makes for a miserable experience. The Solo queue experience in general is a nightmare - curious as to why this isn't a separate option. There are no punishments for leaving a game early, which can be an awful way to start a game if you have a teammate who is less than a good team player and decides to bail on you in a 4v5 situation. 

[h3]Interactions and Priority[/h3]
This game is [b] NOT [/b] a physics based game for the most part. Much of the interactions are determined by the animations themselves, which leaves many scenarios (volleys, headers, bicycle kicks) unpredictable - often in defense, you will find yourself getting no priority on a block that you input far before the attacker registered his shot, and yet the shot blazes past you into the net. More often than not, games are won and lost by what feels like unfortunate luck or random chance - the game decides you don't get to block that shot. Enjoy your loss. Currently, in 1.201.002, tackling is really tough for defenders, especially on the sides and in the corner. When you land a tackle, the ball just bounces right back to the attackers feet and they can continue forward. Blocking shots is also very hard currently. Headers and shots for defenders have subpar priority, and so the current situation is to use the body dive to try to block a shot, which is unpredictable and unsatisfying to use.

[h3]Goalie[/h3]
where to begin with this mess? In the recent patch, new animations for the goalie were added. They have a very high chance of occurring, and are never the animations you would want in the scenarios they appear. The goalie does what I would describe as genuinely unathletic movements, and the ball sails 3 feet to the side of him into an easy goal.  Frequently, the wrong animation entirely will occur regardless of your input (eg: you input right, the goalie jumps straight up) They have claimed that they fixed this with the recent patch, but I've played 100 ish games in the new patch and still see it happen a lot. Boo. Frequently the goalie can get insta-tackled when he receives the ball as well. 

[h3]The Meta[/h3]
The metagame has gone through some huge highs and lows across the lifecycle of this game. At first, the play was to just shoot the ball down the field and let your striker air kick it into the net. Patch 2 and 3 tried to combat this, and did so in a frustrating way (more later) , but with the most recent update it is back in full swing. For a promise of a game that was supposed to "feel" more "soccer-y", it really feels like a silly cartoonish way to play. As mentioned above, body blocking is the only way to really combat this. Even then, it's really hard to be consistent with. 

[h3]The DEVELOPMENT CYCLE[/h3]
Here's the biggest beef I have with this whole thing. The way they go about making changes to the game. As mentioned, most interactions are determined by animations, not physics. So making changes is weird, and often results in unforseen consequences (lmao). Sloclap to date, has not really patched any major issues without simultaneously introducing new, worse ones. 
Situations like this: 
1. We made some changes to goalie animations. Oops, now the goalie can catch the ball behind the net and it's NOT a goal (this was an issue for a LONG. LONG time) 
2. We made some changes to priority. Headers are better now! Oops, now the characters run slower and movement is so clunky that it feels like you're running in syrup. 
3. We made some changes to the movement, now it should feel good! Oops, now extra effort sends you in a straight line forever
4. We fixed that! oops, now the volley meta is back in full force and everyone just sends missles down the field. Also you can't reliably block with headers anymore. And the indicator diamond just doesn't show up sometimes. ONLY $10 FOR A BATTLE PASS!!!!!!! 

[h2] The UGLY [/h2]
I don't really need to cover much here. The missile meta is lame. The players that use it are often toxic and awful to team with. Also the reddit community for this game is a cesspit of bellyachers that call every advanced skill "cheating", and seek to bully the devs to beat the game down until it is soccer for itty bitty babies that each get their own turn and everyone gets one goal!!! Don't forget to share and have fun!!!!!!!!!!! 



In short, this game really should have been in beta for longer, and probably built from the ground up differently. I don't mind some jank in the game. the FGC knows what i'm talking about here - people with a higher skill level can learn to take advantage of quirks in a games physics engine to raise the skil ceiling. I'm TOTALLY FINE WITH THAT. but changing it wildly from patch to patch is exhausting to deal with and makes for a miserable experience. Decide what you want - do you want a crazy game with a high skill ceiling and less realistic gameplay? Cool, fix the matchmaking so that high skill players can actually just stick with those people. No? okay then commit and nerf those things to oblivion til the game is limited to basic passing and shooting, lmao.

但是这几把问题也太多了，刚出不久的游戏，白天就人迹罕至，各种bug横飞，独的独，‘well done’嘲讽的嘲讽，踢破防退的退，还有匹配机制的不平衡，之前白银的时候就能匹配到精英，给我玩得汗流浃背，螳臂当车的感受真是过于沉重呢，比赛中也不知是延迟还是bug，各种问题，间接影响队伍得分乃至失分。从β test一路走来，人的进步甚至赶不上游戏的退步，官方的不作为、烂作为，实在太影响玩家游戏体验，玩家流失，背负一切骂名，都是你们应得的，sloclap
интересная игра,крутые эмоции,неплохо,стандофф получше будет

I've played since the beta and can say this game was worth my money. I honestly can’t believe this. How is it possible that we are STILL facing network issues since the beta? It’s been months, and nothing has changed. Every single match feels like a lottery depending on the servers.

On top of that, the gameplay is broken. Almost every goal is a volley, even when the defender is literally on top of the ball with his head. It makes no sense and completely kills the immersion.

And what’s worse? In 2025, there’s still no proper reporting system. No way to report cheaters, griefers, or people exploiting bugs. It’s like the developers simply don’t care about the community at all.

Some animations are clunky, the hit detection is inconsistent, and the balance is nonexistent. This isn’t just frustrating—it’s disrespectful to the players who have been supporting the game since day one.

We didn’t pay to be beta testers forever. Fix your game.

Il est cool mais encore trop de bugs : 
- Quand t'es gardien et que tu récupères un ballon pile au moment du shoots adverse, tu récupères la balle mais tu ne peux plus faire d'action ensuite, du coup tu te retrouves comme un nanard avec la balle et tu te fais taclés et but...

- des fois en gardien quand tu plonges, la balle te traverse alors que t'es bien dessus. Pareille avec les lobes.
- des fois tu tacles un joueur mais la balle reste quand même dans la direction de celui-ci du coup c'est comme si t'avais rien fait
- le boost t'empêche d'aller dans la direction que tu veux et te fais perdre la balle même si elle est devant toi.. Ce qui peut etre une mécanique, mais dans ce cas, il faudrait pouvoir faire en sortes de mapper le boost comme on le souhaite sur la manette car il s'active régulièrement sans qu'on le souhaite vraiment.
- en défense, marquer un joueur ne sert pas forcement car ils ont parfois l'avantage sur l'action, on ne sait pas comment

The Game was enjoyable and addictive in the Beta phase but with every update it somehow got worse and never better. Every Update fixes some issues but these issues reappear with a different name and it is honestly frustrating.

What was at the beginning a game that could have had good progress with the right developmnent has turned into a project that I would not have on my resume if I took part of it. To me it is sincerely baffling how every update has brought:

A) Visual Glitches that affect anticipation and reaction 
B) Movement Glitches that affect the meta of the game
C) A small issue that annoys you at the sight of it but is easily forgotten (even by the devs)

and since Season 1 the game has felt dull. Individuality has basically been killed and I see the same 5 stereotypes in every game I even manage to get in after a minute of queue time, which is the longest I had experienced. And the Queue Time being longer is surprising, considering that Crossplay was such a big announcement and an update to this game. I can only give this game some time to maybe develop again in the right direction but with the decisions that have been made in recent times it seems like there is barely any ear given to the community.

Apart from that there are many other issues that have been in this game since a long time now.

-Goalkeepers being able to hand the ball outside the box
-Goalkeepers being able to hold the ball inside the goal net
-Goalkeepers sometimes getting screwed by the Animation they receive or the game suddenly making the goalkeeper stutter when diving to the side, letting the ball in
-Tackles not getting registered by the physics engine but being registered by the points tally
-Report Button in game for PC Players, you will get send onto a steam window to block/report the player over steam instead of in game which works for crossplatform
-Ball Phasing through Players when being shot at with said ball

If I missed any, you are free to correct me in the comments.
awful game that gets worse with every patch, terrible developers

Don’t buy this game. It’s honestly a bad experience. You may wonder why I say that, so here’s my list:

More bugs than content: The game has more bugs than the entire Hollow Knight series combined.

Repetitive opponents: Matches are almost always against the same 3–4 players, and when they use boring playstyles, it gets frustrating fast.

Server issues: The networking is terrible — crashes and disconnects happen constantly.

Invisible characters and objects: I’ve had many matches where character models didn’t load, making them invisible the whole game. Sometimes even the ball disappeared.

Cosmetics over fixes: Instead of addressing bugs, the devs keep releasing cosmetic items. On the rare occasion they attempt a fix, it usually creates 3–4 new bugs that never get patched.

Overall: It’s sad — I really wanted to enjoy this game, but it’s been ruined in just a few months. Hopefully, the developers use the money from monetization to fund another game, preferably a single-player game, because this one has turned into a pile of ♥♥♥♥.

There is a lot to like about this game, and a lot of frustrating points. The devs are very open about the current bugs/exploits that exist in the gameplay, and I've no reason to doubt they're working hard on resolving them. That being said, I would basically call this game a Beta. There's just too much essential multiplayer features or QoL improvements that aren't here but are very obvious. I would love a way to indicate whether or not I'm willing to play keeper when loading into a match. More emotes/voice lines and adding a gesture wheel a la CS2 would be fantastic. For crossplay titles like this where you're very likely to run into teammates who aren't mic'd up (or who you would never wany to hear the sound of their voice) this kind of thing is essential, especially if you're interested in ranked play. Also, please let me free play with my party while queueing instead of just myself.

The one glaring negative here is the semi-wokeage in the models and character customization. Everything is so obviously designed to be androgenous and intended to be lightly adapted to either male or female models. Would it kill game devs to let me have an objectively hot chick as my player? Is that really out-of-bounds?

All that said, the gameplay loop is pretty satisfying and it follows the golden rule all good entries in competitive multiplayer gaming must follow: easy to learn, difficult to master.

И так Rematch.
Довольно веселая игра, если погрузиться в атмосферу то очень даже энергичная, Внебрачный сын рокет лиги и фифы без правил. Сейчас напишу минусы и плюсы и подведем итог.
Пинусы: 1. Игре нужны Снг сервера. Хороший пинг вы не получите никак, при стабильном интернете он около 60-80 до смертельных 140 и хуже.
2. Тяжелый порог вхождения. На данный момент 02.10.2025 новичкам уже тяжело выживать даже в анранкеде, если вы начинали играть с 0 сезона то жить можно и даже в неком плане получать удовольствие, но сейчас уже придумали блейдшот, всякие баганные дриблинги, дольфиншот, и бог ты угадаешь каким конкретно приемом забьют тебе в этот раз(
3. Онлайн. Опять же во время даты написании данного отзыва онлайн практически мизерный. В ранкеде ты можешь запустить спокойно и в самом худшем случае будешь ждать минуту. НО! то что происходит с анранкед серверами просто поражает, поиск может идти по 5-10 минут, и даже после этого времени ты не запустишься, потому что опять же - онлайна нет, все стремятся к ранкеду, потренироваться тебе никто не даст.
4. Механики. В целом претензий к самой механике игры нет, но по поводу вратарей ооооочень большой вопрос. Если в 0-ом сезоне это 1-2 патч с вратарями все было хорошо, и они отлично выполняли свою функцию то 3-4 патч это просто п*дц. Вратари не могут нормально прыгать, бывает такое что даже вовсе не прыгнет, если вратарь прыгает влево то он летит не боком а ♥♥♥♥ передом, от чего ты не можешь никак забрать мяч. (на заметку - если хотите чаще забивать, бейте в верхние или нижние углы, вратарь их практически не берет)
5. И самое легендарное - рассинхрон. И вот ты играешь за центрального игра, ты выбил мяч у нападающего и вот вот ты уже бежишь ии..... какого то х*я нападающий все равно бежит дальше с мячом хотя тебе даже дали 300 очков за перехват.
Пинусов очень много, давайте перейдем к скромным плюсам
Плюсы:
1. Если вы играете компанией 3-5 человек, то вы правда получаете драйф, эмоции, вы искринне радуетесь что забили этот злое*учий гол. Вы получаете удовольствие от того что конкретно вам доверили пас, вы отстояли защиту и тд и тп
2. Не знаю почему большинство отзывов жалуются на то что не могут постоянно взять мяч летящий на них, скорее это их проблемы потому что за все мои 200 часов не было такого ни разу, тут 2 варианта, либо вам дали ужасный пас который никак не берется, либо вы ужасно нажали кнопку подбора, будь то пробел, или с. Поэтому я считаю огромным плюсом то что мяч не берется так легко и нужно хотя бы банально прицелиться/встать на место куда упадет мяч и после этого его взять
3. Кастомизация. Тут все коротко - довольно скудно но если постараться то можно и сделать что то интересное.
Наверное это всё. Советую ли я брать эту игру? Скорее нет чем да, хотя если вы не прочь побеситься, поругаться на игру то это алмаз для вас. Если вы хотите купить эту игру, или хотели но передумали, то лучше вам повременить еще до 2-3 сезона, Потому что сейчас игра только пытается встать на ноги, но к сожалению или счастью у нее это не получается (патч на патче патчем погоняет) У игры есть огромный потенциал, если разработчики искринне ей займутся по серьезному то это разорвет все чарты, даже я человек который не любит футбол, не интересуется им, все равно продолжает играть из-за драйва и механик.

Игра ощущается сырой и при этом стоит дороже, чем должна. Адекватная цена для такого проекта — около 5 евро или даже бесплатно, учитывая наличие боевого пропуска и большого количества косметического доната. При этом внутриигровую валюту можно достаточно легко заработать без доната, просто повышая уровень, что немного сглаживает ситуацию.

По геймплею: играется приятно и непринуждённо, в отличие от больших соревновательных игр вроде CS, Valorant или Dota. Не особо похоже на класические игры про спорт по типу FIFA/FC. Ближе всего проект по ощущениям к Rocket League: матчи динамичные, проходят быстро и в зависимости от команды бывают очень увлекательными.

Из минусов — в игре практически нет нормального обучения. Нет режима с ботами к примеру, а встроенное обучение выглядит скорее как список кнопок в настройках, чем реальное обучение. Учиться приходится только на практике, и даже после 16 часов я до сих пор иногда путаю кнопки или теряюсь в напряжённых моментах, когда мяч оказывается у меня.

I judge games by their solo experience, even if they’re marketed toward groups, because that’s where the flaws stand out most. Unfortunately, REMATCH just doesn’t hold up on its own. Without friends to laugh at the bugs and glitches with, the game becomes frustrating, and often unfair.

I have more clips of the game not working correctly than of actual cool goals. Missing features at launch, poorly balanced gameplay, and unreliable servers make it difficult to enjoy. The will to keep playing usually dies out after a few matches, especially when bugs directly cost you wins. To make matters worse, the servers feel worse than even the weakest days of Rocket League servers.

Problems that have been here since launch (and still remain):

Ball teleporting around mid-match

Ball ignoring collision with your player (fairly often)

Players tackling you without being anywhere near you (often)

You not tackling players despite being right next to them (fairly often)

Goalkeepers catching balls from way too far away (very often)

Goalkeepers not catching the ball, even when it goes through them

Achievements glitched (sometimes you get them, sometimes not—no clear reason)

Super weird ball priority (sometimes passing works, sometimes the shooter magically gets it first)

Passing on mouse & keyboard has been broken since beta (improved slightly, but still messes up your cursor with high-DPI mice)

On rare occasions, even shooting isn’t accurate, sending the ball to places your cursor never was

Beyond the bugs, the overall user experience feels incomplete. Basic quality-of-life features that exist in nearly every modern game were missing for months. For example, a report button was only added long after launch, which meant ranked play was flooded with griefers who went unpunished.

Verdict:
REMATCH has amazing potential but is only “fun” if you have friends to share the chaos with. As a solo player, it’s a frustrating mess of glitches, bad servers, and missing features. Until the core issues are fixed, I can’t recommend it.

I always dreamed of a PVP soccer game where everyone takes control of a single player and competes in the football arena. The first time I faced Pro Soccer Online, and now this game has been released by the developers of Sifu with a fantasy style and arena's similar to rocket league.

The game is definitely my taste, and I put lots of time into playing it, while I am not much of a soccer fan. Though the updates are completing the game more and more by the time the game was released, it lacked a variety of modes, and customizing the player didn't have much variety. 

Right now with further updates, they added 3vs3 rank mode, reduced the speed of gameplay, and put in more cosmetic stuff. Still, there is a private server, which players can modify for the mercy rule, match length, etc. We definitely need this option in a public server where, along with Quick Match, there would be public servers as well with many more options to modify.

Finally, based on the release date version, I give this game a [b]7.5/10[/b] score, but when the game becomes more complete, it deserves [b]8.5/10[/b].

Comprei esse jogo na pré-venda e quis muito acreditar nele, só que com 2 meses de lançamento, season 1 lançada e 100 horas de gameplay, estou começando a perder as esperanças. Rematch tem uma ideia muito boa, um design interessante, mas muitas coisas tornam a experiência do Rematch extremamente frustrante, fazendo com que jogar uma hora desse jogo sem se irritar seja quase impossível.

A primeira coisa que me incomoda nesse jogo é pela parte de cosmético(que parece que a empresa está bem empenhada). Uma das coisas mais atrativas em questão de cosmético é o estádio/arena, que possuem algumas muito lindas, e que te fazem realmente querer comprar, mas aí você vai lá, compra sua arena, e joga uma partida sem sequer ver ela. Por algum motivo os devs acharam que seria uma boa ideia você ver as arenas dos outros jogadores e não só a sua, e como tem 10 jogadores em uma partida, é normal que você sequer veja o item que você comprou, sério, qual a dificuldade de simplesmente fazer você ver sua própria arena? Se eu comprei uma arena eu quero ver ela, não a do Xambinho213.
Além disso o jogo possuí uma customização de perfil também, só que um pequeno detalhe…. NÃO DÁ PRA VER O PERFIL DOS OUTROS JOGADORES. Sério, no começo eu achei que era por que estava no beta, mas até agora você não consegue ver o perfil de ninguém, o jogo não tem histórico, se você sair do tempo de 8 segundos após o final da partida você não tem nenhum registro de que ela sequer aconteceu, e principalmente, o jogo não tem uma ferramenta de replay e nem nada parecido para você conseguir salvar jogadas, e todo mundo quer mostrar uma play de alguma partida, mas isso atualmente só é possível se você utilizar um programa externo(o que vai fazer você perder fps consequentemente).

Eu tenho 100 horas do jogo, e ainda não entendi como a hitbox dos personagens funciona direito, algumas horas a bola simplesmente atravessa seu personagem(O que também pode acontecer se você for goleiro por sinal), fazendo com que seja quase impossível você jogar uma partida em que não aconteça algum erro que influencie diretamente uma jogada, a quantidade de partidas que eu já perdi por a bola atravessar jogador, jogador não dominar, ou alguém simplesmente não conseguir encostar na bola do meu time faz com que isso não seja um lance ou outro, é algo recorrente que é difícil você não presenciar. Esses bugs eram pra acontecer na beta, mas desde que lançou até agora você ainda consegue encontrar eles facilmente, se for no discord do jogo então verá toneladas de bugs enquanto a empresa está lançando a coleção do Kobbie Manoo.

Por último, essa parte não é nem tanto culpa da empresa, mas cacete, que comunidade de  filho da puta. Você começa a jogar empenhado em ser um bom teammate, em tocar a bola pro seu amigo, tentar defender, voltar para marcar, mas depois de três jogos caindo com o ItoshiRin_Egoissmode que fica parado na área igual um boneco de posto e manda good job cada vez que alguém erra algo você abandona seu bom lado e vira a pessoa mais tóxica o possível. Parece que na maioria dos jogos você está jogando mais contra o seu próprio time do que você mesmo, o que é extremamente frustrante, já que diferente de outros jogos competitivos como LoL, CS, e etc, aqui você não pode simplesmente carregar um jogo fazendo 1v9, já que não adianta nada você ser bom se ninguém vai tocar a bola pra você, ou não vão conseguir dominar uma bola que foi em cima de você. Eu joguei com um amigo que era Elite no prata e ele mal conseguia jogar pelo fato do time ser muito ruim, mesmo ele fazendo uma óbvia diferença. O chat de voz é praticamente insustentável de usar também, ninguém usa aquilo para se comunicar, apenas pra xingar e tiltar os outros.
Ah, e um detalhe se você quiser jogar o jogo, se você tiltar? The game is a beautiful vision of football with unique rules and mechanics that will captivate even those unfamiliar with the game

Football has long been a source of incredible stories, stirring intense emotions among fans and uniting many people rooting for their beloved clubs, national teams, and even individual players. And while the format itself is constantly changing, the goal remains the same: score more goals than your opponent.

Sloclap Studio, in collaboration with publisher Kepler Interactive (who also released the fantastic Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 this year), has undertaken to create a game that will allow you to see football from a different perspective.

A pitch full of excitement and emotion, or the game itself
We begin with a captivating prologue in which a little-known player dribbles and scores a beautiful goal, after which he is spotted by a scout and signs a professional contract. The dream of many young athletes.

Of course, there's also another prologue, combined with a tutorial, which will be useful in illustrating one of the game's main challenges... but more on that later. In any case, the prologue perfectly illustrates what we're dealing with: we control a single player who, along with the rest of the team, competes in successive matches against others, striving for the same goal as us: victory.

And the prologue, Rematch, should appeal to those who enjoy several quick games instead of one long one. Each match lasts six minutes, except in a draw, when the game goes to the first goal. However, a four-goal lead for one team automatically ends the match. Matches are exactly as they should be: dynamic, undemanding, and exciting. And addictive. Honestly, I didn't have a single moment where I wanted to turn the game off and never return.

What sets Rematch apart from other sports games is its lack of realism, the camera angles, and the unique rules of football. Instead of observing the game from a bird's-eye view, players control their character from a third-person perspective. This has both advantages and disadvantages, as passes and shots are much more precise, although at the cost of a poorer view of the pitch than in typical football games.

The lack of realism is evident, among other things, in the fact that the pitches feature walls that can be used to disorient opponents or for unconventional passes (similar to Rocket League). It's a shame that most players seem to ignore them and underuse them, trying to play like regular football, resulting in poorer results.

Sloclap Studio has focused on gameplay based on individual skill and teamwork.
The gameplay itself is tactical, but very dynamic. Those who prefer a slower pace may not feel comfortable here. Decisions sometimes have to be made in a split second, as you're immediately surrounded by other players upon receiving the ball. And with the camera positioned behind a character in the heat of the moment, it's sometimes difficult to see that an opponent is already making a tackle behind you. Sure, there's a minimap that makes it easier to track the situation, but you don't always have enough time to see it and react. For those who enjoy building squads, tweaking stats, and the like, let me tell you right away: you won't find any of that here. Of course, you might feel much better in a specific role: goalkeeper, defender, and ball-handler, with good field vision and passing, or even scoring goals. The problem is, to be truly good at Rematch, all of these skills need to be practiced regularly.

👍Pros
- Engaging, downright addictive gameplay that never gets boring;
- No balance issues – gameplay based on player skill;
- Stylized graphics that perfectly emphasize the game's detachment from realism;
- A clear sense of agency – each player knows what they're responsible for...

👎Cons
- ...assuming, of course, that you find people who want to work together and don't treat the game as a one-on-one game;
- Bugs–rare, but when they do occur, they can affect the outcome of the match;
- Some animations and camerawork are less impressive;
- Battle Pass in a paid game.

📊Overall.
Despite all this, I'll reiterate: the gameplay is engaging and exciting. It reminds me of how much fun I had playing games like Rocket League or Red Card from 2003. Even losing a match encourages you to try again, and when you find a team of great players who want to work together and win, it's one of the most beautiful experiences a gamer can have. And that's what gaming is all about. I'd go so far as to say that even people who aren't into kickball will find their way into this game and have a blast. Of course, that's assuming they enjoy fast-paced gameplay and have no problem making quick decisions.
🎯7.5/10

Это цирк!


It’s impossible to describe in words just how much of an empty shell this game turned out to be.

At first, my friends and I jumped into the Rematch beta test full of excitement and joy. To give you an idea — we were grinding dozens of hours every single day during the beta, and when it ended, we were literally going through withdrawal, desperately waiting to finally touch the full release version of Rematch. Every single day.

Then the long-awaited “moment X” arrived — the official drop of the game on Steam. My friends and I went all in: bought the fattest, juiciest deluxe-gold-president-Optimus Prime editions so we could play 3 days earlier, plus some extra goodies (I’ll get to those later). And what do you think happened? We jumped into online mode, and what we saw was best described as a mini theater play:

June

Servers: Welcome to the release version of Rematch! Just so you know, we’re absolute ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥, and we know it. We don’t care about your high-speed internet or your close proximity to European server hubs — we’re just diarrhea from a dying horse that’s about to keel over.

Us: Why did it all go to hell at release? It wasn’t this bad during the beta with lag and ping. You promised to fix everything before launch! Call the devs, let them answer.

Servers: Whimpering noises we’re dying… whimper… 0

Devs: What do you want?

Us: What have you done to the game we fell in love with during the beta? Why did it all get worse?

Devs: Hmm… well yeah, there are problems… but anyway, we’ll deal with it eventually. For now, enjoy some cosmetic accessories and the Ronaldinho character.

Us: Are you seriously going to fix your servers??!!

Devs: Don’t worry, everything will be fine in the next few days.

October

Us: Servers are still complete garbage.

Devs: But hey, we’ve got a Balenciaga collab!

The End

And after being treated like this, I only have one desire:
To line up the CEO of Sloclap, their HR managers, designers, programmers, motion specialists, freelance contractors, office janitors, and even the cafeteria cooks — and slap each one across the face for releasing Rematch like this.

Because you simply cannot launch an unfinished, completely raw game that pretends to be a competitive online experience, yet can’t even provide working servers. Instead, they happily serve up the following “features”:

Laggy servers

High ping

Pixelated, grainy graphics even on max settings

No key binding options

Broken dribbling animations

Broken ball magnetism, heavily tied to your ping (see points 1 and 2)

Lame season passes with skins that aren’t even that cool (subjective, but still)

No text chat in a multiplayer game, only 6 canned phrases that don’t cover most situations

Constantly bugged season pass purchases — payment rarely goes through on the first (or even third) try

I cannot in good faith recommend this game to anybody. I'll give it credit, it is an extremely attractive football/soccer game to your average person. Watching youtubers who play this game consistently make it appear to be a genuinely fun time, maybe looking at highlights get your attention? I'm sorry to say this but, that's an illusion! This game unfortunately will not provide you with a fun experience. Here's a multitude of reasons why!

The mechanics are not good. The base dribbling mechanics for handling the ball, you cannot use those against any good defender. You will get locked down completely. The only way for you to genuinely out dribble someone is to embrace the jank mechanics. The  jank mechanics being those community made moves, which are basically just bugs. You've got people doing full 90 degree turns running at full speed, literally transitioning from full sprint in one direction, immediately in the other direction to then slide from one side to the other! That is not intentionally in the game! Yet moves like that are genuinely the only way you are dribbling against a good defender. And for that, the game is ♥♥♥♥.
Speaking of dumb mechanics, air dribbling. Yeah there is no way to word this other than it is a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ mechanic. You've got people who can air dribble from one side of the field to the other without being intercepted once because of how spontaneous and erratic the move is. The only way to intercept it is to try and jump into it, try doing that when they're changing direction rapidly with every touch.
Tackles are broken! Even if you perfectly read an opponent's move and "intercept" the ball from them. You'll find that a lot of the time they can get the ball back almost immediately. Because they don't get stunned! 
The actual way you perform moves in this game too such as passes, rainbow flicks and air dribbles. The controls are really unnatural, you'll find yourself often saying "why the hell did my character do that?? I wanted him to do this??", I'm truly puzzled how I can rainbow flick in the same direction 4 times when I'm pressing the buttons for him to go in a different direction.
If you're going to run around in the game, forget about the A and D keys. The movement is cooked to the point that if you use A or D you're putting yourself at a disadvantage. Same goes for controller. if you're gonna move just stick forward and move the camera. 
Oh also you'll often find that the goalkeeper is ♥♥♥♥♥♥. With them magnetising balls to their hands that weren't even close to them to begin with. Tackling balls that are outside of their box and gliding all over the place when you hold down a movement key for too long.
You will notice that a lot of the time, the balls which you should absolutely be able to manipulate. You don't get the option to do anything with them. 
Extra effort is silly, it's a speed boost but all it does is push the ball away from you! With that in mind, it's extremely easy to activate accidentally. So you'll often have moments where you're accidentally turning it on, pushing the ball ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ ages away from yourself straight into the defender.
Actually controlling the ball can be weird sometimes. The priority for it is messy and sometimes plainly doesn't happen despite you running over the thing.

Okay enough about mechanics. What about the playerbase? Well from my experience it's quite toxic. The LFG is full of ranked elite players wanting to do nothing but comp all night. Yet all they will do is complain every time you make one error and promptly rage quit the group to another. They will embrace the meta with no possibility of playing the game the way it was intended, or in a way that is actually fun. So if you're a new player, good luck finding a group to play with because I guarrantee you that nobody is going to help.
Aside from the discord and LFG, what about solo queue? You will have a rough time! Unfortunately most players in this game are ball hogs and straight up idiots. They will rarely pass the ball, they will make the most stupid decisions imaginable and they will cause you to lose your mind in rage. 

There's a battlepass too. Why in a soccer/football game do we have a battlepass. We're already paying a lot for a game that is subpar, why do you want me to pay extra to get the GOOD parts of the battlepass? That's not even the full picture. There's a shop where you can purchase sponsored items. THEY AREN'T EVEN GOOD YET THEY'RE STILL RIDICULOUSLY PRICED.

I just... It hurts because this game had a whole lot of potential. But it fails to live up to it in every single way. The development team takes lightyears to pump out updates. And even when the updates do come out. THEY DON'T FIX THE PROBLEMS! THEY CREATE MORE! It's just a tragedy. Don't get the game, it is not worth the trouble.

10/10 skilled gameplay. Here is what this looks like on the keyboard: C C C C C C C C

As someone who got to experience this game for free, I’m writing this review to share my thoughts.  

Overall, I found the game fun and engaging, with only a few minor issues from my perspective. For example, winning the ball didn’t always feel fair, and goalkeepers felt too strong at times — with just one dive, they could even leap from behind and take the ball away easily, no matter how well you positioned yourself.

The passing aim system also didn’t feel very good — unlike shooting, which was exciting and satisfying, passing often felt off and could definitely be improved. I also think adding a small foul and warning system would make tackles more balanced, and the dribbling mechanics felt a bit limited. Expanding that in the future could make the experience of dribbling much more satisfying.

In general, though, I found the game innovative and entertaining — it actually reminded me of Shaolin Soccer, and it was a blast to play. I’d definitely recommend trying it.

That said, in my opinion the price is too high for a game of this style. Lowering the price, or even making it free and focusing on in-game purchases, could both maintain profitability and grow the player base. Personally, I enjoyed it a lot, but I wouldn’t buy it at its current price. Still, my overall impression of the game is positive.
